languages.text: "Я сохраню твою тайну, но помни — теперь твои жизнь и доброе имя в моих руках".
"I will keep your secret, but remember — your good name and your life are in my hands now."
languages.original_text: "Я сохраню твою тайну, но помни — теперь твои жизнь и доброе имя в моих руках".

traits.locale_text: "I will keep your secret, but remember — your good name and your life are in my hands now."
"I will keep your secret, but remember — your good name and your life are in my hands now."
"I will keep your secret, but remember — your good name and your life are in my hands now."

languages.text: «Guardaré su secreto, pero recuerde: su buen nombre y su vida están en mis manos».
languages.original_text: "I will keep your secret, but remember — your good name and your life are in my hands now."

traits.locale_text: «Guardaré su secreto, pero recuerde: su buen nombre y su vida están en mis manos».

languages.text: “我会替你保密，但记住了——你的名声和性命现在都在我手里。”
languages.original_text: "I will keep your secret, but remember — your good name and your life are in my hands now."

traits.locale_text: “我会替你保密，但记住了——你的名声和性命现在都在我手里。”

languages.text: « Je garderai votre secret, mais n'oubliez pas... Dorénavant, votre vie et votre réputation sont entre mes mains. »
languages.original_text: "I will keep your secret, but remember — your good name and your life are in my hands now."

traits.locale_text: « Je garderai votre secret, mais n'oubliez pas... Dorénavant, votre vie et votre réputation sont entre mes mains. »

languages.text: "Sırrını saklayacağım ama unutma. O güzel ismin ve hayatın artık benim ellerimde."
languages.original_text: "I will keep your secret, but remember — your good name and your life are in my hands now."

traits.locale_text: "Sırrını saklayacağım ama unutma. O güzel ismin ve hayatın artık benim ellerimde."

languages.text: "Ich werde Euer Geheimnis wahren, aber denkt daran — Euer guter Name und Euer Leben liegen nun in meinen Händen."
languages.original_text: "I will keep your secret, but remember — your good name and your life are in my hands now."

traits.locale_text: "Ich werde Euer Geheimnis wahren, aber denkt daran — Euer guter Name und Euer Leben liegen nun in meinen Händen."

languages.text: 「君の秘密は守るが、覚えておけ。君の評判と命は、今は私の手に委ねられている。」
languages.original_text: "I will keep your secret, but remember — your good name and your life are in my hands now."

traits.locale_text: 「君の秘密は守るが、覚えておけ。君の評判と命は、今は私の手に委ねられている。」
